title: American Water Works Sustains Strong Financials And Operations, Trades At Fair Value
text: American Water Works is a water and wastewater utility company serving over 14 million clients across 14 states. AWK's growth strategy focuses on balanced capex targets, value-based strength, and sustainable financial positioning. Despite underperformance in the utility industry, AWK outperforms due to superior operational capability and capital efficiency.

title: Another Rate Hike! 7 Stocks to Buy Following the Fed's Latest Move
text: In a not exactly unexpected development, the Federal Reserve last week announced that it raised its key interest rate by a quarter percentage point, which then inherently bolsters the case for stocks to buy after a rate hike. Primarily, investors shouldn't expect much relief from policymakers.

title: American Water (AWK) Q2 Earnings & Revenues Beat Estimates
text: American Water Works' (AWK) second-quarter earnings and revenues are better than expected due to the implementation of new rates and contributions from acquired assets.

title: American Water Works (AWK) Q2 Earnings and Revenues Surpass Estimates
text: American Water Works (AWK) came out with quarterly earnings of $1.44 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.27 per share. This compares to earnings of $1.20 per share a year ago.

title: American Water Declares Quarterly Dividend
text: CAMDEN, N.J.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--American Water Works Company, Inc. (NYSE: AWK) announced today that its board of directors declared a quarterly cash dividend payment of $0.7075 per share of common stock, payable on September 1, 2023, to all shareholders of record as of August 8, 2023. This quarterly dividend is a continuation of the increase in the annualized dividend approved by the Board and announced in April 2023. title: Pennsylvania American Water Signs Agreement to Purchase Greene County Water System
text: MECHANICSBURG, Pa.--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #MakeEveryDayEarthDay--Pennsylvania American Water, a subsidiary of American Water (NYSE: AWK), announced today that it signed an agreement with East Dunkard Water Authority to purchase its water system assets for $5 million. title: American Water's (AWK) Missouri Arm Buys Wood Heights Assets

title: Missouri American Water Completes Acquisition of Wood Heights Water and Wastewater Systems
text: ST. JOSEPH, Mo.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Today Missouri American Water announced the closing of its acquisition of the Wood Heights water and wastewater systems in Ray County, Mo., about 30 miles northeast of Kansas City, Mo. title: California American Water Relaxes Water Use Requirements for its Monterey Peninsula Customers

title: American Water Works' (AWK) Kentucky Arm Files Rate Hike
text: American Water Works' (AWK) unit Kentucky American Water files for a rate hike approval after four years. The new hike will provide funds for necessary maintenance and upgrades.

title: California American Water Aquifer Storage and Recovery Program Captures Near Historic Levels of Winter Rain
text: PACIFIC GROVE, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--California American Water‘s Aquifer Storage and Recovery (ASR) program captured excess winter rainwater from the Carmel River and injected 1,656.42 acre feet of water into the Seaside Basin this winter. The stored water will help alleviate water needs during future dry periods without rain and will reduce future reliance on the Carmel River and Seaside Basin.
